rulings.Case Title: KEVIN SINCLAIR ET AL VS. JIAN MING CHEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday August 30, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT ZIPREALTY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MICHAEL SON Notice Of Motion To Strike Second Amended Complaint is moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN SINCLAIR ET AL VS. JIAN MING CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday August 30, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT ZIPREALTY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MICHAEL SON DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained as follows: 1. Demurrer to the causes of action for fraudulent concealment, constructive fraud, breach of oral contract and promissory estoppel is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff was granted a leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) giving rise to delayed discovery. See Fox v. Ethicon Endo-Surgery, Inc. (2005) 35 Cal. 4th 797 and WA Southwest 2, LLC v. First American Title Ins. Co. (2015) 240 Cal.App.4th 148). Plaintiff failed to do so. 2. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege each element of this cause of action not amounting to fraud or constructive fraud, i.e. subjecting this cause of action to a four-year statute of limitations. 3. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of written contract is sustained with final leave to amend to allege each element of this cause of action including consideration and obligations of the parties. (See CACI 302). 4. Demurrer to the cause of action for UCL violation is sustained without leave to amend as no injury in fact is alleged. B&P 17204. Plaintiff addressed the demurrer on the merits. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday August 30, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to join Deutsche Bank. See Straube v. Security First (1962) 205 Cal.App.2d 352; Washington Mutual v. Blechman (2007) 157 Cal. App. 4th 662. The misjoinder argument has not been waived. Deutsche is not adequately represented by defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday August 30, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT ALTAPACIFIC BANK, A CALIFORNIA STATE CHARTED NON DEMURRER TO 5TH AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained. Demurer to the seventh cause of action for negligence is sustained without leave to amend. Motion for summary adjudication was granted as to this cause of action. Demurer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend. See ruling on Dolmen Property Group, LLC's Demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BONNIE KAY SPINDLER ET AL VS. ALISON WRIGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday August 30, 2016, line 11. DEFENDANT ALISON WRIGHT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to substantially comply with SFRO 37.9A(f)(2). The sole exhibit provided for by the statue is missing from the recorded document. The reference to two different properties on the face of the Memorandum is misleading. = (501/REQ)
